title: Array Technologies Q1 2023 Earnings Results
text: Array Technologies reported quarterly earnings of $0.13 per share, beating Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.09 per share compared to earnings of $0.06 per share year ago. Company held Q1 2023 earnings conference call on May 9, 2023. Current consensus EPS estimate is $0.18 on $285.86 million in revenues for coming quarter and $0.61 on $1.09 billion in revenues for current fiscal year. Estimate revisions trend for Array Technologies was mixed ahead of earnings release, with current status translating into Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) for stock.
